query: SELECT so.canonical_hash AS "canonical_hash!: Vec<u8>", so.received_at AS "received_at!: String", so.payload AS "payload?: Vec<u8>", so.signature AS "signature!: Vec<u8>" FROM signed_objects so JOIN post_revisions pr ON pr.canonical_hash = so.canonical_hash JOIN posts p ON p.id = pr.post_id WHERE p.author = ? AND so.payload IS NOT NULL AND ( ? IS NULL OR so.received_at > ? OR (so.received_at = ? AND so.canonical_hash > ?) ) ORDER BY so.received_at ASC, so.canonical_hash ASC LIMIT ?
